/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/QuarkEngine.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QuarkEngine.dir/src/editor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QuarkEngine.dir/src/scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QuarkEngine.dir/src/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QuarkEngine.dir/src/tex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QuarkEngine.dir/src/models.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QuarkEngine.dir/src/ImGuizmo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QuarkEngine.dir/libs/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QuarkEngine.dir/libs/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QuarkEngine.dir/libs/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QuarkEngine.dir/libs/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QuarkEngine.dir/libs/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QuarkEngine.dir/libs/rlImGui/rlImGui.cpp.o -o bin/QuarkEngine   -L/home/vova/Quark/libs/raylib/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/vova/Quark/libs/raylib/lib -lraylib -lGL -lm -lpthread -ldl -lrt -lX11
